---
name: Compatibility Update Request
about: Request support for a newer or specific Minecraft game version for this pack.
title: "[VERSION REQUEST] *Replace me with game version*"

assignees: RandomGgames

### What game version do you want supported?
Game Version: ```game_version_here```

### Current Behavior & Issues
*Please replace me with a description of the issue along with logs/screenshots as applicable.*

- [ ] The pack completely breaks / logs errors in the console.
- [ ] The pack partially works, but some features are missing/broken.
- [ ] The pack works, but it shows the "Made for an older version of Minecraft" warning.
- [ ] I have already tested in my target version already
